description: Epoch-wise parameter-improving niche pipeline. A persistent direction_params.json encodes 'how to search/phrase well'; each epoch a human labels which search directions were on_target vs diverge, and the MAIN orchestrator nudges the params toward the on_target profile. Per-epoch success = measurable search-quality improvement (R12); niche-finding is the long-run goal. 5 sequential subagents (sourcer -> merger -> verifier -> cross-checker -> search-quality scorer) + MAIN. Builds on the proven Run 15 loop.

merge_schema.primary_quote: verbatim >=30-char substring of atom_a or atom_b text

param_update.rule: for each search-quality param, nudge by lr*(mean dim-score of on_target labeled queries - mean dim-score of diverge labeled queries), clamped [0.05,0.95]. No labels => no change (baseline epoch).
param_update.metric: avg_search_quality = sum(param_k * dimension_mean_k)/sum(param_k); delta vs previous epoch is the per-epoch success signal (R12).

hard_rules.R1: agents sequential, each commits+pushes before next (branch claude/run-16)
hard_rules.R2: push after every agent; if push fails -> STOP+report
hard_rules.R5: record ONLY web_search results actually seen
hard_rules.R9: direction_params.json persists across epochs (read at start, write at end)
hard_rules.R10: track avg_search_quality per epoch in epoch_history
hard_rules.R11: if session long -> commit partial + report
hard_rules.R12: per-epoch success = search_quality improvement (not niche); report delta honestly
